testcase.name: test_recon_sheet_present

failure.message:
AssertionError: Missing 'P&L' line in recon sheet: Reconciliation — Books to Clause 44 (ICAI Para 79.4)
Particulars | Amount Total Expenditure as per Profit & Loss | 8072786.270000002 + Capital expenditure additions (ICAI Para 79.18) | 0 Less: Non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0 Less: Schedule III items (salary, wages, PF/ESI, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0 Less: Money / Securities transactions (interest, TDS, investments, share transactions) | 0 Less: Other auditor-elected exclusions | 0 = Reportable Expenditure (Col 2 of Clause 44) | 8072786.270000002
Disclaimer Test disclaimer iteration_18. assert 'p&l' in 'reconciliation — books to clause 44 (icai para 79.4)

particulars | amount
total expenditure as per profit & loss | 8072786.270000002
+ capital expenditure additions (icai para 79.18) | 0
less: non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0
less: schedule iii items (salary, wages, pf/esi, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0
less: money / securities transactions (interest, tds, investments, share transactions) | 0
less: other auditor-elected exclusions | 0
= reportable expenditure (col 2 of clause 44) | 8072786.270000002

disclaimer
test disclaimer iteration_18.' + where 'p&l' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9892492f7b0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9892492f7b0> = 'P&L'.lower + and 'reconciliation — books to clause 44 (icai para 79.4)

particulars | amount
total expenditure as per profit & loss | 8072786.270000002
+ capital expenditure additions (icai para 79.18) | 0
less: non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0
less: schedule iii items (salary, wages, pf/esi, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0
less: money / securities transactions (interest, tds, investments, share transactions) | 0
less: other auditor-elected exclusions | 0
= reportable expenditure (col 2 of clause 44) | 8072786.270000002

disclaimer
test disclaimer iteration_18.' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xab54af4f9a70>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xab54af4f9a70> = 'Reconciliation — Books to Clause 44 (ICAI Para 79.4)

Particulars | Amount
Total Expenditure as per Profit & Loss | 8072786.270000002
+ Capital expenditure additions (ICAI Para 79.18) | 0
Less: Non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0
Less: Schedule III items (salary, wages, PF/ESI, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0
Less: Money / Securities transactions (interest, TDS, investments, share transactions) | 0
Less: Other auditor-elected exclusions | 0
= Reportable Expenditure (Col 2 of Clause 44) | 8072786.270000002

Disclaimer
Test disclaimer iteration_18.'.lower

testcase.failure:
tests/test_clause44_release1_live.py:214: in test_recon_sheet_present assert needle.lower() in text.lower(), \ E AssertionError: Missing 'P&L' line in recon sheet: E Reconciliation — Books to Clause 44 (ICAI Para 79.4) E E Particulars | Amount E Total Expenditure as per Profit & Loss | 8072786.270000002 E + Capital expenditure additions (ICAI Para 79.18) | 0 E Less: Non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0 E Less: Schedule III items (salary, wages, PF/ESI, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0 E Less: Money / Securities transactions (interest, TDS, investments, share transactions) | 0 E Less: Other auditor-elected exclusions | 0 E = Reportable Expenditure (Col 2 of Clause 44) | 8072786.270000002 E E Disclaimer E Test disclaimer iteration_18. E assert 'p&l' in 'reconciliation — books to clause 44 (icai para 79.4)

particulars | amount
total expenditure as per profit & loss | 8072786.270000002
+ capital expenditure additions (icai para 79.18) | 0
less: non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0
less: schedule iii items (salary, wages, pf/esi, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0
less: money / securities transactions (interest, tds, investments, share transactions) | 0
less: other auditor-elected exclusions | 0
= reportable expenditure (col 2 of clause 44) | 8072786.270000002

disclaimer
test disclaimer iteration_18.' E + where 'p&l' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9892492f7b0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9892492f7b0> = 'P&L'.lower E + and 'reconciliation — books to clause 44 (icai para 79.4)

particulars | amount
total expenditure as per profit & loss | 8072786.270000002
+ capital expenditure additions (icai para 79.18) | 0
less: non-cash charges (depreciation, provisions, fair-value losses) | 0
less: schedule iii items (salary, wages, pf/esi, gratuity, dividend declared, sale of land/building) | 0
less: money / securities transactions (interest, tds, investments, share transactions) | 0
less: other auditor-elected exclusions | 0
= reportable expenditure (col 2 of clause 44) | 8072786.270000002
